results.rendered_html: pratimalla (1. pra˚ + malla) m. Gegenringer, Gegenkämpfer; Rival: raṇe siddhistu mallānāṃ patimallanipātajā  HARIV. 4711 . krameṇa ca yamau tatra (bāhuyuddhe) prakarṣaṃ sa tathā yathā . ajīyata na kenāpi pratimallena bhūtale ..  KATHĀS. 25,120 . taṃ cedgajedraṃ prāpnomi pratimallaṃ naḍāgireḥ 12,10 . vatsa iti khyāto deśaḥ — svargasya nirmito dhātrā pratimalla iva kṣitau 9,4 .
